race.description: Farewell Robyn Fife Country Boosted Mdn Hcp
race.comment: KIRWANS BRIDGE (6) placed at Canberra and then improved again off a wide gate, beaten just 1.2L over 1400m at Gundagai. The blinkers go back on today and JVO replaces Heywood. Peaks and will go close with average luck. ROY KELTON (1) debuts and went close in the second of his three trials with race rider Heywood aboard. Has the inside gate and a bold run is on the cards. TSARINA DIAMONDS (9)  will race over further but has good ability and has a low gate. She will be running into it. ENTIRELY OAK (8) is stepping up in trip after finishing fifth over 1000m at Orange last time out. Has the tongue tie on again and won't be far away.
